title: Understanding Emotion and Motivation
prompt: Think about a time when your emotions influenced your motivation or your motivation shaped your emotional experience. Describe the situation and analyze it using at least one theory of emotion (James-Lange, Cannon-Bard, Schachter-Singer, or cognitive appraisal) and at least one concept related to motivation (intrinsic/extrinsic motivation, drive theory, arousal theory, or Maslow's hierarchy). How did the interplay between emotion and motivation affect your behavior and decision-making in that situation?
